title: Problem 1.2
statement_text: Determine the complete set of obstructions for diplanar quartic Eulerian digraphs.
context_text: The paper studies the partial order on quartic Eulerian digraphs defined by cycle removal followed by suppression of degree-2 vertices. Since diplanarity is hereditary under this order (Lemma 1.1), it is natural to seek the minimal non-diplanar elements (obstructions). The paper makes partial progress, classifying all obstructions containing parallel arcs, but the complete list remains open.
paper_title: Embedding Quartic Eulerian Digraphs on the Plane
